name: venn-desktop
description: Electron desktop wrapper for the Venn web app

scripts.build: npm run sync:version && npm run sync:web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:win:portable: npm run sync:version && npm run sync:web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win portable
scripts.build:win:nsis: npm run sync:version && npm run sync:web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis
